message:
Running command: # Verify DRT is still running and provide final status
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -5
echo ""
echo "Sustained monitor log:"
cat /tmp/sustained_drt.log 2>/dev/null | head -5
